purpose: Data-only regression fixtures for SPY Ideal starter execution context. These fixtures classify setup-time quote usability only and do not choose a trade, backtest, calculate P&L, prove profitability, or mark readiness.

rule_summary.fallback: none after selected/top-ranked contract fails a gate

fixtures.reason: The SPY Ideal top-ranked starter contract abstains because its only local quote is after setup, so there is no selected setup-safe quote for execution-context classification.
A post-signal quote is future option data and cannot improve setup-time execution context.

explicit_non_goals: No raw Databento files are modified.
No backtest, entry, fill, exit, P&L, proof, profitability, readiness, live, broker, order, account, main.py, or Railway behavior is authorized.
